name: reflex runner
short_description: test your precision platforming skills as you jetpack through challenging levels with crazy obstacles. explore and find hidden items strewn throughout the game. race against the ghost of your best clear times, or against the developer ghost! can you clear all levels and make it to the rooftop party?
detailed_description:
race to set the fastest clear times across 39 unique and challenging levels.

REFLEX RUNNER SURVIVAL TIPS

- avoid the following obstacles as they can be hazardous to your health -

spike - you wouldn't want to fall into a piranha pit, so do not fall into these.
laser - bad news if you touch it.
saw blade - great for woodworking, not so great for reflex runners.
fire turret - avoid the flame to win the game.
lava stone - connect with your inner indiana jones to outrun these stones.
pulverizer - the name speaks for itself.
killer pillar - refer to the pulverizer description.

BATTLE YOUR GHOST FOR GREATNESS

defeat your own ghost to set new personal bests!

GET SOCIAL

share your personal bests to the community hub!

TIGHT RACES LEAD TO REWARDING WINS
